description_long: This is an ornate multi-strand necklace displayed on a contoured jewelry bust stand. The necklace features several closely spaced, delicate chains or beaded strands that drape gracefully across the front, creating a layered effect. The uppermost strand appears to be a single, continuous band, while the lower strands are more intricate and densely arranged. The jewelry stand is smooth and matte, with a broad, rounded front and a narrow, stable base. The necklace itself is likely crafted from a shiny metal, possibly silver or white gold, and may include small decorative elements or stones, though no prominent gemstones are visible. The overall presentation is elegant and designed to showcase the necklace's detailed craftsmanship.
description: A multi-strand, intricately layered necklace displayed on a smooth, contoured bust stand. The necklace features delicate, closely spaced chains or beads, creating an elegant and elaborate appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full layered arrangement of the necklace draped across the bust, highlighting the intricate multi-strand design.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the necklace's profile and how the strands curve around the bust, with the stand's angled support visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing mostly the back of the bust stand, with only the uppermost strand of the necklace faintly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, displaying the necklace's side profile and the stand's supporting structure.
